zh.lifeSummary: 當William Tryon於1752年9月3日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德時，他的父親Benjamin Tryon36歲，母親Rebecca Hurlbut32歲。他於1784年6月9日與Anna Hurlburt在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1821年1月14日在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德法明頓享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Tryon于1752年9月3日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德时，他的父亲Benjamin Tryon36岁，母亲Rebecca Hurlbut32岁。他于1784年6月9日与Anna Hurlburt在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1821年1月14日在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德法明頓享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tryon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire, Rutland and Northamptonshire): altered form of Dutch Trion, itself a shortened variant of Tirion, a cognate of Walloon and French Thiry .

History: A Northamptonshire family of this name trace their descent from Peter Trieon (died 1611), who went to England from the Netherlands c. 1562. His son, Moses Tryon, was high sheriff of Northamptonshire in 1624. William Tryon (born 1729 in Surrey, England) was the last provincial governor of NY; he gave his name to Tryon County, the district which took in the Mohawk Valley; after the American Revolution this huge area was split into Montgomery, Fulton, and other counties.

variants.name: Thiry
meanings: Walloon, French (mainly Lorraine and Ardennes), and Luxembourgish: from the personal name Thiry, a regional variant of French Thierry . This surname is also found in Germany and in the Flemish part of Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: British Forces Capture Fort Griswold
historicEvents.description: The capture of Fort Griswold was the final act of treason that Benedict Arnold committed. This would be a British victory. On the American side 85 were killed, 35 wounded and paroled, 28 taken prisoner, 13 escaped, and 1 twelve year old was captured and released.
historicEvents.urlTitle: History of the Battle of Groton and The Burning of New London

historicEvents.description: George Washington elected first president of United States.
War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

en.lifeSummary: When William Tryon was born on 3 September 1752, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Benjamin Tryon, was 36 and his mother, Rebecca Hurlbut, was 32. He married Anna Hurlburt on 9 June 1784, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 14 January 1821, in Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Tryon est né le 3 septembre 1752, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Benjamin Tryon, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Hurlbut, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Anna Hurlburt le 9 juin 1784, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 14 janvier 1821, à Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Tryon am 3. September 1752 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Benjamin Tryon 36 und seine Mutter Rebecca Hurlbut 32. Er hat am 9. Juni 1784 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten Anna Hurlburt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Januar 1821 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Tryon è nato il il 3 settembre 1752 nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Benjamin Tryon, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Rebecca Hurlbut, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Anna Hurlburt il 9 giugno 1784, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 gennaio 1821, nel Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Tryonが1752年9月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで生まれた時，父Benjamin Tryonは36歳，母Rebecca Hurlbutは32歳であった。1784年6月9日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでAnna Hurlburtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1821年1月14日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードファルミントンで68歳で死去した。

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드
ko.Glastonbury, Hartford, Connecticut, Unit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 글라스토버이
ko.lifeSummary: William Tryon(이)가 1752년 9월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Benjamin Tryon(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Rebecca Hurlbut(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1784년 6월 9일 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 Anna Hurlburt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1821년 1월 14일 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 패밍턴에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Tryon nasceu em 3 de setembro de 1752, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Benjamin Tryon, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca Hurlbut, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Hurlburt em 9 de junho de 1784, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de janeiro de 1821, em Farmington, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 68 anos.

ru.Glastonbury, Hartford, Connecticut, Unit: гластонбури, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Tryon родился 3 сентября 1752 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Benjamin Tryon было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Hurlbut, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Hurlburt 9 июня 1784 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 14 января 1821 г. в местности фармингтон, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 68 лет.
